title: RSW Coffee Mug Set Fine China Christmas Holly 340ml Cups Hot Choco Beverages 2pcs
features: Features a holiday-themed design on the rim and a poinsettia design in the centre.
Made from new bone china material, known for its elegance and durability
Ideal for sharing a cozy moment with a loved one. Each mug has a capacity of 340 ml.
Approx. Product Dimensions: D: 12 x W: 19 x H: 11 cm
description: This set of two mugs is an excellent addition to any Christmas collection. They are made of new bone china and feature a Christmas Holly design. A thoughtful and practical gift during the holiday season.
